payload.answer: Ignored as a duplicate Slack retry; no new memory created.
citations: Input: Same Slack event ID delivered twice for: Sam from Goldman likes Bill Evans.

entity_resolution.reason: The Slack event ID was delivered twice; this is a duplicate retry, so no new durable memory should be committed.

details: Duplicate event detected by identical Slack event ID.
No memory cards were created or updated.

repair_options: If the original event was missed, ingest the first occurrence only and suppress subsequent retries by Slack event ID.
If this was intended as a new fact, provide a new unique event ID.
